item.title: Siegfried & Joy
item.description:
I follow them on social media for a daily dose of serotonin and oxytocin.
They're also outspoken antifascists and hate the afd, which makes them regular dudes in my book.

item.title: It’s been a hot minute.. dump #something
item.description:
I use to work at a Starbucks.. something is ALWAYS brewing in there
Teehee
I’m bisexual which means I’m attracted to men who are attracted to me and I don’t want to be attracted to men that are attracted to me. Wut?
My cuddle pug

item.title: What Happened Today #30
item.description: Even Sundays aren't exempt from shakeups. The US stopped cyberops against Russia, sidelined a senior USAID voice warning that aid cuts cost lives, and ordered agencies to sidestep environmental and transparency laws. Military aid and crypto moves added fuel to today's chaos. Review & share with your people. #resist #GovBriefToday Your links are below. 1 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/defense-secretary-pete-hegseth-orders-halt-offensive-cyber-operations-rcna194435 2 - https://www.spokesman.com/stories/2025/mar/02/senior-usaid-official-ousted-after-detailing-probl/ 3 - https://www.reuters.com/world/rubio-signs-declaration-expedite-delivery-4-billion-military-aid-israel-2025-03-02/ 4 - https://www.cbsnews.com/news/scott-bessent-treasury-secretary-ukraine-economic-deal-face-the-nation/ 5 - https://apnews.com/article/trudeau-canada-king-charles-trump-5140e841c40e394bba21c2619534aa7c 6 - https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/02/trump-announces-strategic-crypto-reserve-including-bitcoin-solana-xrp-and-more.html 7 - https://www.straitstimes.com/world/now-its-log-baby-log-as-trump-eyes-us-national-forests 8 - https://home.treasury.gov/news/press-releases/sb0038 9 - https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/02/johnson-stopgap-funding-bill-doge-cuts-00206881 Fighting Back - https://techcrunch.com/2025/03/01/mark-cuban-offers-to-fund-government-tech-unit-that-was-cut-in-the-middle-of-the-night/?g Archive - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: ‘Go Ski in Russia’ – US Protesters Send Vance Into Hiding During Vacation - Leaves Vermont in a Hurry.
item.description: Lining the streets of his motorcade route, gathered in front of his picturesque inn, and draped in Ukrainian flags as they skied down the slopes of the Sugarbush Resort, more than 1,000 protesters in Vermont. Vance had planned to have a quiet ski weekend with his family at the cozy Pitcher Inn near the slopes of Sugarbush, but he ended up being moved to an “undisclosed location” in the area instead, the New York Post reported. One of the protesters, Tekla Van Hoven from nearby Waterbury, told a Vermont TV station, “Ski Russia, because JD Vance has no friends in Vermont, but he’s got lots of friends in Russia, so he should go there for vacation.” Trump and Vance earned less than one-third of the votes in Vermont in the 2024 elections, their worst defeat in any state. (Only the District of Columbia rendered more embarrassing results for them, where they carried only 6.5 percent of the vote.) So, the cost of this vacation caravan, the same as every fire fired National Forest Park Ranger? https://www.kyivpost.com/post/48140
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Cleveland, Ohio, USA Supports Ukraine
item.description: GET READY FOR A RECESSION 1) Buy nonperishable nutritious food on sale and store it. Cases of cans of food can be stored under a bed. Rotate your stock. (Eat whatever will go out of date first.) 2) Buy necessities on sale and store them. For example: Light bulbs. Toilet paper. 3) Cut unnecessary expenses as much as you can. Are you wasting money? 4) Look for places to reduce costs. For example: Can you find less expensive car insurance? 5) If you can, establish an emergency fund. 6) If you can, pay down debt. 7) If you can, start a victory garden (or a big garden). 8) Get or make a list of local food pantries and places that provide free meals. 9) If you can, sell your clutter. 10) Begin to make use of the library for free entertainment. 11) Go on picnics rather than eat in restaurants. 12) Maintain your health. In the USA, health care is expensive. Prevent health problems through appropriate exercise and a good diet. Walking is good exercise and can be free entertainment. CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls HOW DO I MUTE OR BLOCK AN IMGUR USER? https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26508943104667-How-do-I-mute-or-block-a-user# Michael Sellers: “A Deeper Look at Claims by KGB Officer that Trump was Recruited by Soviet Intelligence in the 1980s” (23 February 2025) I’m a Former CIA Russia Specialist – Here’s My Take https://michaeldsellers.substack.com/p/a-deeper-look-at-claims-by-kgb-officer?r=50xud&utm_medium=ios Brian Tyler Cohen: “Prosecutor LASHES OUT at DOJ after ILLEGAL stunt” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xPq346l3oTo THE CAPITOL RIOT: AS IT HAPPENED (YouTube, 1 hour and 31 minutes) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_6uSYhyFao4 BRIAN TYLER COHEN: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@briantylercohen https://bsky.app/profile/briantylercohen.bsky.social GLENN KIRSCHNER: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (JUSTICE MATTERS) https://www.youtube.com/@GlennKirschner2 https://bsky.app/profile/glennkirschner.bsky.social MARC ELIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (DEMOCRACY DOCKET) https://www.youtube.com/c/DemocracyDocket https://bsky.app/profile/marcelias.bsky.social https://www.democracydocket.com ASSOCIATED PRESS (Independent International News Agency): FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT by Reporting the Facts https://apnews.com ANDREW TOBIAS: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://andrewtobias.com ROBERT REICH: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT https://www.youtube.com/@RBReich https://robertreich.substack.com WIRED INVESTIGATIVE JOURNALISM: FIGHTING THE GOOD FIGHT (Investigative Journalism) https://www.wired.com/category/politics/ THE GUARDIAN (British Newspaper) https://www.theguardian.com/us DAVID HOGG https://bsky.app/profile/davidhogg.bsky.social RACHEL MADDOW (TV) https://www.msnbc.com/rachel-maddow-show INDIVISIBLE https://indivisible.org 5calls.org “Calling your congressperson is the most effective way to influence policy.” https://5calls.org Ukraine’s Euromaiden Protests Raw Footage documentary. Protests that ousted a Putin puppet. https://youtu.be/NK_rEIzV16g World History of Protests and Strikes Map https://map.workingclasshistory.com/#map=4.13/46.98/14.2 US Labor Movement History https://youtu.be/ewu-v36szlE Yoon Impeachment Protests that Ground Seoul to a Halt Every Saturday Until He Was Impeached https://youtu.be/PI94llSaMW0?si=r9t_a5vYgV-Ii0FJ June Uprising South Korea to Restore Democracy https://youtu.be/oExFFQMxw3c?si=FWdLwkfIwecSETyU Litigation Tracker: Legal Challenges to Trump Administration Actions https://www.justsecurity.org/107087/tracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions/ “Nolite te bastardes carborundorum.” “Don’t let the bastards grind you down.” Trump’s Egg Prices https://www.trumpseggprices.com Protest Songs & Lyrics Historical, Social Justice & Human Rights Songs http://www.protestsonglyrics.net Spike Jones - Der Fuehrer's Face https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lWF8iRCan7I THREE STOOGES - Ep. 44 - You Nazty Spy https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mTBWkMQz6nY The THREE STOOGES - Ep.56 - I'll Never Heil Again https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vEApJmUXamg CHECK TO SEE IF A SITE IS SAFE Google’s Safe Browsing technology examines billions of URLs per day looking for unsafe websites. Every day, we discover thousands of new unsafe sites, many of which are legitimate websites that have been compromised. When we detect unsafe sites, we show warnings on Google Search and in web browsers. You can search to see whether a website is currently dangerous to visit. https://transparencyreport.google.com/safe-browsing/search ANNA FROM URAINE: UKRAINE NEWS https://www.youtube.com/@AnnafromUkraine PROFESSOR GERDES EXPLAINS: UKRAINE NEWS https://www.youtube.com/@Professor-Gerdes DOCTORS WITHOUT BORDERS https://www.doctorswithoutborders.org/what-we-do/where-we-work/palestine UNITED24 (UNITED FOR UKRAINE): AN OFFICIAL WEBSITE OF THE UKRAINIAN GOVERNMENT Donations are deductible to the full extent allowable under IRS regulations. UNITED24 is registered in the USA as a 501c3 organization by the Embassy of Ukraine. https://u24.gov.ua UKRAINE FACT SHEET: How You Can Help Ukraine (USA Gov Website) https://travel.state.gov/content/travel/en/News/Intercountry-Adoption-News/ukraine---fact-sheet--how-you-can-help.html UKRAINE SUPPORT TRACKER A Database of Military, Financial and Humanitarian Aid to Ukraine https://www.ifw-kiel.de/topics/war-against-ukraine/ukraine-support-tracker/ LESSONS FROM TIM SNYDER ON TYRANNY https://imgur.com/gallery/thread-lessons-from-tim-snyder-s-on-tyranny-because-while-you-may-have-no-interest-authoritarians-they-have-interest-you-8svGv7A#/user/oukid/favorites Sad Bastards of Brooklyn: “Somewhere Over the Rainbow” (A Song for Ukraine) https://youtu.be/QnEoAkzIxYY Richard Grosser: “Ukraine: National Anthem” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HqB3eBlXv3M
item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: dump, from an ass
item.description:
maybe a little ranch too
this seems chill
look up the story behind this song, its strange
this had no business making me laugh as much as it did
HOLD ME NOW
*pfffffftttttt*
well, more than a mile
I know that's right
gonna get a big dish of beef chow mein
this and a glass of milk
my fat boy loves balloons. have a good week
